user_message:
Review PR #184 document `docs/brainstorms/hypothesis-validation-framework.md` as a ce-doc-review persona. Document type: requirements. Origin: none. Use the skill schema mentally and return only a concise JSON-ish summary of findings: title, severity P0-P3, section, why_it_matters, finding_type error|omission, autofix_class, confidence 50|75|100, evidence quotes from the document. Suppress style and low-confidence concerns.

Document content with line numbers:
[Use PR final document]
1 # Hypothesis Validation Framework
3 _Draft brainstorm. Created 2026-07-04. Revised 2026-07-04 after self-review. Milestone: v0.11.0. Confidence: 72%._
7 Prove or disprove the core hypothesis: "structured decision retrieval measurably improves agent work quality compared to no retrieval or raw transcript retrieval."
9 Current state: the feedback loops (outcome → quality → ranking) are architecturally sound, but all evidence is circular — the system measures its own internal metrics (applied_context_rate, quality_score) without external ground truth. This document defines an evaluation framework that produces non-circular evidence.
19-23 The Three Questions table: Q1 proactive injection change behavior, Q2 outcome better, Q3 ranker right decisions.
25 Scope note: controlled comparison suppresses proactive injection only; MCP tools/manual ec search remain; null result means proactive injection adds nothing over on-demand retrieval, not decision system useless.
27 Approach 1 Injection On/Off Experiment.
31 Session-level A/B invalid due shared repo/decision DB treatment leakage.
33-44 Alternate injection on/off in weekly time blocks; config experiment_schedule; SessionStart records injection_block; measure manual retrieval compensation.
50-57 Quality signals table: revert/fixup rate, session turn count, test pass rate, contradiction rate; assessment verdict dropped as circular.
61-66 sample size estimates and directional signal caveat.
70-73 implementation: config key, SessionStart block, AAR, ec experiment report.
75 Approach 2 Outcome Inference Accuracy Audit.
79 auto_apply infers accepted when surfaced-decision files overlap with modified files.
83-99 N=50 sessions, reviewer verdicts, precision CI, annotator bias mitigations, sample-outcomes/outcome-accuracy CLIs.
101-103 gate precision <0.5 redesign before trusting injection experiment.
105 Approach 3 Ranking Precision Benchmark.
109 rank_related_decisions returns top-k; no ground truth.
111-118 blocking ranking_snapshots table with input_files, input_diff_text, input_commits, ranked_results, opt-in capture and content_filter redaction; 4-6 weeks to 100 cases.
120-136 design metrics and weight tuning via 5-fold CV + temporal holdout.
138 Approach 4 Comparative Baseline.
142-159 compare no memory, raw FTS5 transcript injected, structured decisions; human quality; transcript injection path absent.
163 defer until Approach 1 shows signal; if no effect and no compensatory manual retrieval, skip and accept article thesis applies.
165-180 Scope In/Out.
182-201 Sequencing: Phase1 audit, Phase2 snapshots/benchmark, Phase3 crossover requiring Phase1 pass, Phase4 baseline if positive.
203-211 Risks: underpowered, carryover, not blind, proxy validity, annotation bias, snapshot storage, survivorship.
213-219 Review questions.
assistant_summary: Using `compound-engineering:ce-doc-review` because you requested the ce-doc-review persona; I’ll load its instructions, then return only findings.
